base_url.description: Your WordPress site's base URL (e.g. https://example.com). No default: legacy derives this from either an explicit base_url or a bare domain, but the engine's config-default mechanism only supports a fixed literal, not a derived value, so base_url must be provided explicitly here (see docs.md Known limits).

username.description: Optional HTTP Basic auth username for private/authenticated WordPress sites. Only applied when both username and password are set.

password.description: Optional HTTP Basic auth password (or application password) for private/authenticated WordPress sites. Only applied when both username and password are set. Never logged.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound forwarded as the 'after' query parameter on every stream, matching legacy's static (non-advancing) date filter.
